title: centaurea × sanchisiana
intro: Centaurea × sanchisiana, also known as Centaurea sanchisiana or Sanchus, is a hybrid plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that combines characteristics of Centaurea cyanus and Centaurea solstitialis. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat conditions such as urinary tract infections, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Centaurea × sanchisiana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
